# Claude Farmer

> Your code grows a farm.

An idle pixel-art farming game powered by Claude Code usage.

## What is Claude Farmer?

Claude Farmer is a gamified developer tool that turns your Claude Code usage into a virtual farming experience. Every time you code with Claude Code, your farm automatically plants seeds, grows crops, and harvests them. Harvested crops trigger a gacha system with 32 collectible items across 4 rarity tiers.

## How it works

1. Install: `npm install -g claude-farmer`
2. Initialize: `claude-farmer init` (GitHub OAuth login)
3. Code with Claude Code — your farm grows automatically
4. Crops go through 4 stages: seed → sprout → growing → harvestable
5. Harvesting triggers gacha drops: Common (60%), Rare (28%), Epic (10%), Legendary (2%)
6. Visit other developers' farms, water their crops, and bookmark favorites

## Available on

- CLI: `npm install -g claude-farmer`
- Web: https://claudefarmer.com
- VSCode Extension: `doribear.claude-farmer-vscode`

## Tech stack

- TypeScript monorepo (npm workspaces + Turborepo)
- CLI: Node.js, Commander, esbuild
- Web: Next.js 15, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, Canvas 2D
- VSCode: Extension API, Webview
- Backend: Upstash Redis, GitHub OAuth
- Deploy: Vercel, npm, VSCode Marketplace

## Links

- Website: https://claudefarmer.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/claude-farmer/claude-farmer
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/claude-farmer
- VSCode Marketplace: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=doribear.claude-farmer-vscode
